name: Italian Stuffed Chicken Breast
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, and dried oregano in a bowl.
2. Pound the chicken breast to an even thickness using a meat mallet or rolling pin.
3. Spread the Havarti or Swiss cheese on one side of the pounded chicken breast.
4. Roll up the chicken breast tightly around the cheese.
5. Brush the rolled chicken with melted butter.
6. Place the rolled chicken in the breadcrumb mixture and coat evenly.
7. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius).
8. Bake the stuffed chicken for 30 minutes.
9. Add the tomato sauce to the baked chicken and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until heated through and fully cooked.
This recipe makes one serving.
